Upcoming Projects

Pets & Pickers

Motivated by extraordinary compassion and a singular belief that all animals deserve treatment, this 8-episode, unscripted series reveals how the Regional Animal Protection Society (RAPS) Animal Hospital works tirelessly to offer low-income pet family's access to top healthcare.

See project Visit website

Regional Animal Protection Society

The Regional Animal Protection Society is a registered charity that operates the RAPS Cat Sanctuary, the RAPS Adoption & Education Centre, a fostering network, social enterprise thrift stores and the full-service RAPS Animal Hospital.

See project Visit website

Artist Mints

Total Shop Exchange works with artists all around the world to bring their art onto the blockchain. We list our supply of the art through this collection, keeps your eyes open as you might find the needle in the haystack.

See project Visit website
